description:
Overview:

1. Intelligent digital thermos cup, keeping hot and cold for about 0-6 hours.
2. Double-layered thermos cup, made of stainless steel, safe and healthy.
3. Suitable for outdoor sports, traveling, going to work and school, and driving.


Product information:
Color: fog white coffee, fog white black, fog White Blue, archaism silver coffee, archaism Silver Blue, elegant white
Material of liner: 316 stainless steel
Gifts: business gifts, advertising gifts, promotional gifts, conference gifts, welfare gifts, holiday gifts, awards commemorative gifts, public relations gifts
Insulation Performance: 6-12 hours
Material: 316 stainless steel
Applicable gift-giving relationship: Junior, couple, couple, colleague, elder, child, classmate, teacher
Packing specification: 17 * 8cm
Applicable scenarios: sports, wedding, home, car, Spring Festival, office, outdoor, gifts
Applicable people: female, male, child, couple, Universal, elderly, student
Shell material: 201 stainless steel
Applicable occasions for gifts: Birthday, full moon, travel commemoration, graduation, housewarming, party, visiting diseases
Style: handle, with rope handle, large capacity, CUP, shooter glass, big belly Cup, Mini, with straw, with lock, Tumbler
Functions: thickening, household, portable, vacuum, heat preservation, drop resistance, intelligent control, temperature measurement
Applicable holiday: Christmas, Valentine's Day, Spring Festival, Father's Day, Mother's Day, Halloween, Children's Day, Women's Day
Style: Sports
Capacity: 450ml

Attention: The color of the handheld strap is randomly matched


Packing list:
Cup X1PCS
